name: ai-agent-remote-approver
description: Approve/deny AI coding agent permission prompts from your phone via ntfy — serverless SSE callback, rich per-tool previews, resolve-in-place, completion notifications, self-hosted ntfy + Basic auth. Works with Claude Code today; other agents (e.g. kiro-cli) via adapters. Merges claude-remote-approver's architecture with claude-ntfy-hook's rich formatting.
author: local fork (based on claude-remote-approver by Yuuichi Eguchi + rich formatting from claude-ntfy-hook by nickknissen)
